title: Flip default + deprecation
body:
Once the above items are resolved:
- [ ] Change default `rootless_port_forwarder` from `rootlessport` to `pasta`
- [ ] Add deprecation notice for `rootlessport`

https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/755#issuecomment-4424449394

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
